2026 Disney After Hours Planning Tips and Dates for the Perfect Night

Here at Walt Disney World, nights under the stars set the stage for a particular kind of excitement. Maybe it’s the retreat of the Florida sun, the promise of another round of popcorn, or the colorful lighting on iconic rides — there’s something about being in your favorite Disney park at night. author: Disney Parks Blog RSS
text:
Pixar Stories Come to Life at Pixar Days at Sea

Join me as I sail the Pixar way on the Disney Fantasy, experiencing Pixar‑themed foods, activities, and shows throughout the sailing. When our Disney Cruise Line bus pulled into port, the entire bus went quiet, then quickly filled with excitement as Dumbo on the stern came into view, and the Disney Fantasy towered beside us.

The post Pixar Stories Come to Life at Pixar Days at Sea appeared first on Disney Parks Blog.

text:
Discovering Monstropolis at Walt Disney World

Monstropolis is starting to take shape as construction continues at Disney’s Hollywood Studios in Walt Disney World Resort! Steel rises behind the walls, new details emerge almost daily, and with every milestone, the world of Disney and Pixar’s Monsters, Inc. is roaring to life.
